description: Runtime-enforced execution policy for operating near full capacity when normal Python is unstable: shell/coreutils first, jq/node second, python3 -S bounded third, normal Python quarantined.
activation_requirements: active status only after test proof

source_request.governance_text: Runtime-enforced execution policy for operating near full capacity when normal Python is unstable: shell/coreutils first, jq/node second, python3 -S bounded third, normal Python quarantined.

policy_hard_rules: tool probe before each governed stage
normal python requires timeout and cannot be only verifier
json validation defaults to jq or node before python
large recursive jobs must be chunked and receipted
failure must switch lanes rather than repeat same failing tool
